title: agrimonia eupatoria var. nepalensis
intro: Agrimonia eupatoria var. nepalensis, also known as Nepalese agrimony or Agrimony, is a plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family, specifically a variety of Agrimonia eupatoria. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Agrimonia eupatoria var. nepalensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from menstrual cramps, as well as its use as a diuretic to treat urinary tract infections. Agrimonia eupatoria var. nepalensis is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
